data.title_en: What to say upon completing ablution

items.chapter_title_en: What to say upon completing ablution
items.arabic_text: (أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّداً عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ..).
items.english_text: (I bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone without partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and Messenger.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Ashhadu an la ilaha illal-lahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, wa-ashhadu anna Muhammadan AAabduhu warasooluh.)

items.chapter_title_en: What to say upon completing ablution
items.arabic_text: (اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي مِنَ التَّوَّابِينَ وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنَ الْمُتَطَهِّرِينَ)
items.english_text: (O Allah, make me of those who return to You often in repentance and make me of those who remain clean and pure.)

items.chapter_title_en: What to say upon completing ablution
items.arabic_text: (سُبْحانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَأَتوبُ إِلَيْكَ).
items.english_text: (How perfect You are O Allah, and I praise You, I bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped except You, I seek Your forgiveness and turn in repentance to You.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Subhanakal-lahumma wabihamdika ashhadu an la ilaha illa anta astaghfiruka wa-atoobu ilayk.)
